title: Caught exceptions must derive from BaseException
description: This rule checks if exceptions are caught and they derive from BaseException.
message: Caught exception should derive from BaseException

noncompliant.description: Catching exception without deriving from BaseException

compliant.description: Catching exception and deriving from BaseException

why_is_this_an_issue: Not deriving caught exceptions from BaseException may lead to unexpected behavior and difficulty in debugging.

checks.message: Caught exception should derive from BaseException
